productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Chord Black Casual Shoes
description: Skeptical about another trek in bulky shoes? Keep your worries away, for here comes that fabulously light iconic Chord trekking shoe from the adidas originals collection. UpperSynthetic leather upper with a suede collar and suede foxingPerforations on the midfoot in the form of the brand's patented 3-Stripes for enhanced breathabilityLacing system for a snug, customised FitLightly padded collar for optimum fitMesh and fabric inner lining with a padded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded PU midsole detailing for vintage style and lightweight comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careClean the upper using a suede brush and dry, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
